notes: Public F6S top robotics companies/startups in India page. The page states it tracks Unbox Robotics, ideaForge, GreyOrange, and 188 more robotics companies in India; this file captures the visible top-100 directory entries as a dated manual snapshot because direct command-line fetching returns a bot-challenge page.
